libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: For the nativeTest/native run path, set runtime system properties for version 5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful WebClient coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HttpServer on localhost; no external service or Docker setup is required.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The artifact POM has optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2, but it is not needed for core WebClient coverage unless tests deliberately target OAuth2WebClient.

Local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative; if tests exercise native transports, TLS providers, or OAuth2-specific APIs, additional setup may become test-specific rather than library-wide.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 resolves to Vert.x 5.0.1 with Netty 4.2.2.Final; the existing 5.0.0 scaffold already documents that Netty 4.2.x needs explicit unsafe-access runtime properties for Java 25 native runs, but its condition only applies to 5.0.0.
